lines.speaker: Diango
lines.text: Howdy there partner! You came at just the right time! I've got something for ya!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh really? What is it?

lines.speaker: Diango
lines.text: Well, I did some rooting around in my house and found this really neat hat.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A hat? What sort of hat...

lines.speaker: Diango
lines.text: A banana hat! Would you like it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sure, I'll take the hat.

lines.speaker: Diango
lines.text: Looks like you've got no space for it, I'll hold onto it till you do. Just come to me to claim it.

lines.speaker: Diango
lines.text: There you go amigo, enjoy!

lines.speaker: Diango
lines.text: So what else can I do for you partner? Want to see my spinning plates? Or did ya want a holiday item back?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks, I don't want it right now.

lines.speaker: Diango
lines.text: No problem amigo, come back to me to claim it if you change your mind.

lines.speaker: Diango
lines.text: Oh wow, you did it! Well done!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you!

lines.speaker: Diango
lines.text: I was wondering when someone would complete this. I've been holding on to the reward for a while.

lines.speaker: Diango
lines.text: The being who gave it to me was... rather strange.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What was their name?

lines.speaker: Diango
lines.text: They didn't say. But they did give me some sage advice before they left.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What was it?

lines.speaker: Diango
lines.text: I don't remember exactly. Something about making the most of your time...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thyme!

lines.speaker: Diango
lines.text: Where?! I don't see any!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I... don't worry. Thank you for the reward, see you around!

lines.speaker: Diango
lines.text: See you!

lines.speaker: Diango
lines.text: Howdy there partner! Want to see my spinning plates? Or did ya want a holiday item back?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Spinning plates?

lines.speaker: Diango
lines.text: That's right. There's a funny story behind them, their shipment was held up by thieves.

lines.speaker: Diango
lines.text: The crate was marked 'Dragon Plates'. Apparently they thought it was some kind of armour, when really it's just a plate with a dragon on it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to check holiday items please!

lines.speaker: Diango
lines.text: Sure thing, let me just see what you're missing.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What else are you selling?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm fine, thanks.
